features: 🍇 Iconic Vimto Flavour – A juicy fusion of real fruit juices for a refreshingly unique taste.
⚡ Natural Caffeine Kick – Sourced from green coffee beans for a clean, sustained energy lift.
💪 B Vitamin Blend – Includes B3, B6, and B12 to help reduce tiredness and support energy metabolism.
🚫 No Added Sugar – All the flavour, none of the guilt.
🥤 Big 500ml Can – Perfect for on-the-go energy or powering through your day.
📦 Multipack of 12 – Stock up and stay energised all week long.
description: Product Description Experience the bold, unmistakable taste of Vimto Original—now supercharged as a real fruit energy drink! Bursting with the legendary blend of grape, blackcurrant, and raspberry, this energising drink is your go-to boost with zero added sugar and natural caffeine. Ingredients Ingredients: Carbonated Water, Mued 3% (Grape, Blackcurrant, Raspbery), Ad Regulator (Sodium Citrate), Vimnto Favou Fruits, Herbs, Barley Malt and Spices, Fo (Concentrates of Carrot, Hibiscus), Presev Benzoate), Natural Caffeine, Sweetenes, B Vitamins (Niacin, Biotin, B6, B12), Anto Directions High Caffine content. Not recommended for children or pregnant or breast-feeding woman (32ml/100ml) Safety Warning Not recommended for children or pregnant or breast-feeding women due to high caffeine content. Manufacturer Contact Information Nichols Plc, 3 Woodlands Park, Ashton Rd, Newton-le-Willows WA12 0HH See more
